entity.label: Mortar
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Mortar, a place in or near Jerusalem inhabited by silver merchants (Zeph. 1:11). It has been conjectured that it was the “Phoenician quarter” of the city, where the traders of that nation resided, after the Oriental custom.

nodes.label: Mortar
nodes.description: Mortar, a place in or near Jerusalem inhabited by silver merchants (Zeph. 1:11). It has been conjectured that it was the “Phoenician quarter” of the city, where the traders of that nation resided, after the Oriental custom.

verses.text: Howl, ye inhabitants of Maktesh, for all the merchant people are cut down; all they that bear silver are cut off.
